name: document-extractor
title: Document Extractor
description: Pull structured JSON fields from unstructured documents (invoices, receipts, contracts). Distills a deterministic extractor with a strict schema and never-invent guardrail.
default_describe: Extract structured fields as JSON. Only emit fields present in the document; use null for missing values. Never infer values that are not written. Preserve original capitalization for proper nouns.
